client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (data.listing) {\n      setListing(data.listing);\n      setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    }\n    setLoading(false);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [id]);\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-5\">\n          {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n            <img\n              src={listing.book_cover_url}\n              alt={listing.book_title}\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n              style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n            />\n          ) : (\n            <div\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-4xl\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                flexShrink: 0,\n              }}\n            >\n              📖\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-5 pt-4 flex items-center justify-between\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Telegram link section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Step-by-step instructions */}\n              <div\n                className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}\n              >\n                <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>\n                  How to create a Telegram group:\n                </p>\n                <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                  <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>\n                  <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>\n                  <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>\n                  <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>\n                  <li>\n                    Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}\n                    <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>\n                  </li>\n                  <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>\n                  <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                </ol>\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <input\n                    type=\"url\"\n                    className=\"input-field\"\n                    placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"\n                    value={telegramLink}\n                    onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}\n                    style={{\n                      borderColor: telegramLinkError\n                        ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                        : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError\n                          ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                          : undefined,\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  {telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                      {telegramLinkError}\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                  {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                      Valid Telegram link\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  className=\"btn-primary\"\n                  onClick={handleTelegramSave}\n                  disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}\n                  style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}\n                >\n                  {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once\n                they set up the group. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n          Readers ({listing.memberCount})\n        </h2>\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {listing.members.map((member) => (\n            <div\n              key={member.id}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div\n                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              >\n                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n                  {member.display_name}\n                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Organizer\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                {member.bio && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"text-xs\"\n                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {member.bio}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <p\n        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}\n        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n          month: \"long\",\n          day: \"numeric\",\n          year: \"numeric\",\n        })}\n      </p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","numLines":476,"startLine":1,"totalLines":476}}}

 CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    listing_id INTEGER,\n    type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    message TEXT NOT NULL,\n db;","originalFile":"import Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\nimport path from \"path\";\nimport fs from \"fs\";\n\nconst DB_DIR = process.env.DB_DIR || path.join(process.cwd(), \"data\");\nconst DB_PATH = path.join(DB_DIR, \"bookmate.db\");\n\n// Ensure data directory exists\nif (!fs.existsSync(DB_DIR)) {\n  fs.mkdirSync(DB_DIR, { recursive: true });\n}\n\nconst db = new Database(DB_PATH);\n\n// Enable WAL mode for better concurrent performance\ndb.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\ndb.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n\n// Initialize schema\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_genres (\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    genre TEXT NOT NULL,\n    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, genre),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    listing_id INTEGER,\n    type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n  );\n`);\n\nexport default db;\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":72,"oldLines":6,"newStart":72,"newLines":27,"lines":["     FOREIGN {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01SPSuGLF1bnYAbUAhhpBqVk","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01HhAYxc8suvX9VTCTJDCZKB","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","old_string":"export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {","new_string":"export function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":611,"cache_read_input_tokens":49971,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":611},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"627a51f7-f581-4eae-8e58-b20b740ff1f5"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HhAYxc8suvX9VTCTJDCZKB","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"fb757674-3f25-4d7f-9ded-82c038060c29","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:03:30.192Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","oldString":"export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {","newString":"export function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {","originalFile":"import db from \"./db\";\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"new_member\",\n      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a Telegram link soon.`\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":31,"oldLines":6,"newStart":31,"newLines":45,"lines":["   }"," }"," ","+export function notifyApplicationReceived(","+  listingId: number,","+  applicantName: string","+) {","+  const listing = db","+    .prepare(","+      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"","+    )","+    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;","+","+  if (listing) {","+    createNotification(","+      listing.author_id,","+      listingId,","+      \"application_received\",","+      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`","+    );","+  }","+}","+","+export function notifyApplicationDecision(","+  userId: number,","+  listingId: number,","+  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"","+) {","+  const listing = db","+    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","+    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;","+","+  if (listing) {","+    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";","+    const message =","+      decision === \"approved\"","+        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`","+        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;","+    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);","+  }","+}","+"," export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"018380c1-e665-4d3f-b5ce-460cabcb7c60","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:03:35.554Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/create/route.ts","oldString":"    const {\n      bookTitle,\n      bookAuthor,\n      bookCoverUrl,\n      bookOlid,\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n    } = body;","newString":"    const {\n      bookTitle,\n      bookAuthor,\n      bookCoverUrl,\n      bookOlid,\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n    } = body;","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      bookTitle,\n      bookAuthor,\n      bookCoverUrl,\n      bookOlid,\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n    } = body;\n\n    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size)\n         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n      )\n      .run(\n        session.userId,\n        bookTitle.trim(),\n        bookAuthor.trim(),\n        bookCoverUrl || \"\",\n        bookOlid || \"\",\n        language || \"English\",\n        readingPace.trim(),\n        startDate,\n        meetingFormat,\n        size\n      );\n\n    // Auto-join the author as a member\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { id: result.lastInsertRowid },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":20,"oldLines":6,"newStart":20,"newLines":7,"lines":["       startDate,","       meetingFormat,","       maxGroupSize,","+      requiresApproval,","     } = {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01Md1jgqy6ZxVmi5G9ixXj2h","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01HdBqh73S4GdkQ25RhiGci4","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/create/route.ts","old_string":"    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size)\n         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n      )\n      .run(\n        session.userId,\n        bookTitle.trim(),\n        bookAuthor.trim(),\n        bookCoverUrl || \"\",\n        bookOlid || \"\",\n        language || \"English\",\n        readingPace.trim(),\n        startDate,\n        meetingFormat,\n        size\n      );","new_string":"    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval)\n         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n      )\n      .run(\n        session.userId,\n        bookTitle.trim(),\n        bookAuthor.trim(),\n        bookCoverUrl || \"\",\n        bookOlid || \"\",\n        language || \"English\",\n        readingPace.trim(),\n        startDate,\n        meetingFormat,\n        size,\n        requiresApproval ? 1 : 0\n      );"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":313,"cache_read_input_tokens":51104,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":313},"output_tokens":24,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"e9399022-2294-4fc7-b373-782daa0ef012"}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"fbd81d7c-9513-4296-8cb0-0e98207303cc","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:03:42.506Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/create/route.ts","oldString":"    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size)\n         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n      )\n      .run(\n        session.userId,\n        bookTitle.trim(),\n        bookAuthor.trim(),\n        bookCoverUrl || \"\",\n        bookOlid || \"\",\n        language || \"English\",\n        readingPace.trim(),\n        startDate,\n        meetingFormat,\n        size\n      );","newString":"    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval)\n         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n      )\n      .run(\n        session.userId,\n        bookTitle.trim(),\n        bookAuthor.trim(),\n        bookCoverUrl || \"\",\n        bookOlid || \"\",\n        language || \"English\",\n        readingPace.trim(),\n        startDate,\n        meetingFormat,\n        size,\n        requiresApproval ? 1 : 0\n      );","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      bookTitle,\n      bookAuthor,\n      bookCoverUrl,\n      bookOlid,\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n    } = body;\n\n    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size)\n         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n      )\n      .run(\n        session.userId,\n        bookTitle.trim(),\n        bookAuthor.trim(),\n        bookCoverUrl || \"\",\n        bookOlid || \"\",\n        language || \"English\",\n        readingPace.trim(),\n        startDate,\n        meetingFormat,\n        size\n      );\n\n    // Auto-join the author as a member\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { id: result.lastInsertRowid },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":47,"oldLines":8,"newStart":47,"newLines":8,"lines":[" "," Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":510,"cache_read_input_tokens":51417,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":510},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"a70fbdd4-fd9b-4854-ad05-6cf66b4b665a"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VYpdTjJcf9myA2HkmADzfs","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"735c8acc-3dd7-4b37-977d-5b9116762e72","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:03:48.278Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","oldString":"  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }","newString":"  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Count current members\n  const { count } = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n  if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Join\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n  ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  // Notify the author\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  // Check if group is now full\n  const newCount = count + 1;\n  if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: newCount });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":23,"oldLines":6,"newStart":23,"newLines":13,"lines":["     return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });","   }"," ","+  if (listing.requires_approval) {","+    return NextResponse.json(","+      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },","+      { status: 400 }","+    );","+  }","+","   if (listing.is_full) {","     return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });","   }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01WCKhRPrxEoYhe7sXRcXS6L","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01LFfBAQ835odweKmEWTS8Lx","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const isMember = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (isMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already applied (pending)\n  const existingApp = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (existingApp) {\n    if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You have already applied\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n    if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already approved\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n    // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(existingApp.id);\n\n    notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n\n  // Insert new application\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n  ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":411,"cache_read_input_tokens":51927,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":411},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"3697f241-a4d1-42e9-b9cd-8b3b88666781"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LFfBAQ835odweKmEWTS8Lx","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"6a35f426-6bfa-4d6c-8e97-d80f440ed117","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:03:59.816Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const isMember = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (isMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already applied (pending)\n  const existingApp = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (existingApp) {\n    if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You have already applied\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n    if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already approved\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n    // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(existingApp.id);\n\n    notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n\n  // Insert new application\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n  ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_012P5yDotA63Fomz8gEVyVEZ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_013gyvggsx4tGLESApnifeio","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n        return { isFull: true };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n      if (result.isFull) {\n        notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n        // Reject remaining pending applications\n        const pendingApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of pendingApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n          notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n        }\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":901,"cache_read_input_tokens":52338,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":901},"output_tokens":24,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"fe25024a-4f57-4201-9f57-3d320a7b85c1"}

Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n        return { isFull: true };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n      if (result.isFull) {\n        notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n        // Reject remaining pending applications\n        const pendingApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of pendingApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n          notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n        }\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_016tWWTcWV2do3h3E4osYsCn","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01KuhNmrHjGnrpY4pmCCghye","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...listing,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n    },\n  });","new_string":"  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // Check if the current user has a pending application\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember && listing.requires_approval) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(id, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(id) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...listing,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n    },\n  });"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1296,"cache_read_input_tokens":53239,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1296},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"d4052b77-72de-42cd-a70f-af7b559d1f8d"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KuhNmrHjGnrpY4pmCCghye","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"f2fe4d2b-a3ac-4cb4-a6e0-9d2bbefce6cc","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:04:26.699Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...listing,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n    },\n  });","newString":"  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // Check if the current user has a pending application\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember && listing.requires_approval) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(id, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(id) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...listing,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n    },\n  });","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(id) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(id) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...listing,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n    },\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":41,"oldLines":6,"newStart":41,"newLines":35,"lines":["     ? listing.author_id === session.userId","     : false;"," ","+  // Check if the current user has a pending application","+  let hasApplied = false;","+  let applicationStatus = \"\";","+  if (session.userId && !isMember && listing.requires_approval) {","+    const app = db","+      .prepare(","+        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"","+      )","+      .get(id, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;","+    if (app) {","+      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";","+      applicationStatus = app.status;","+    }","+  }","+","+  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author","+  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];","+  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {","+    pendingApplicants = db","+      .prepare(","+        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at","+         FROM listing_applications la","+         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id","+         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'","+         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`","+      )","+      .all(id) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];","+  }","+","   return NextResponse.json({","     listing: {","       ...listing,"]},{"oldStart":48,"oldLines":6,"newStart":77,"newLines":9,"lines":["       memberCount: members.length,","       isMember,","       isAuthor,","+      hasApplied,","+      applicationStatus,","+      pendingApplicants,","     },","   });"," }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0175fjb84fcQoDXZhba3PK9J","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/create/page.tsx has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"a6c645e0-3387-4a1c-9cb5-8352ef585c26","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:04:31.608Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/create/page.tsx","oldString":"  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");","newString":"  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport BookSearch from \"@/components/BookSearch\";\n\nexport default function CreateListingPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookOlid, setBookOlid] = useState(\"\");\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n\n  const handleBookSelect = (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => {\n    setBookTitle(book.title);\n    setBookAuthor(book.author);\n    setBookCoverUrl(book.coverUrl);\n    setBookOlid(book.olid);\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setError(\"\");\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/listings/create\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          bookTitle,\n          bookAuthor,\n          bookCoverUrl,\n          bookOlid,\n          language,\n          readingPace,\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const data = await res.json();\n\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to create listing\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      router.push(`/listings/${data.id}`);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-3xl mb-2\">Start a reading group</h1>\n      <p\n        className=\"mb-8\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Choose a book, set your pace, and wait for readers to join.\n      </p>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-5\">\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Book\n          </label>\n          <BookSearch onSelect={handleBookSelect} />\n          {bookTitle && (\n            <div\n              className=\"mt-2 flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg\"\n              style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\" }}\n            >\n              {bookCoverUrl && (\n                <img\n                  src={bookCoverUrl}\n                  alt=\"\"\n                  className=\"w-10 h-14 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              )}\n              <div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {bookTitle}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  by {bookAuthor}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Discussion language\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={language}\n            onChange={(e) => setLanguage(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            <option>English</option>\n            <option>Spanish</option>\n            <option>French</option>\n            <option>German</option>\n            <option>Russian</option>\n            <option>Portuguese</option>\n            <option>Italian</option>\n            <option>Japanese</option>\n            <option>Chinese</option>\n            <option>Korean</option>\n            <option>Other</option>\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Reading pace\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"text\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={readingPace}\n            onChange={(e) => setReadingPace(e.target.value)}\n            required\n            placeholder='e.g. \"1 chapter per week\" or \"50 pages per day\"'\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Start date\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"date\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={startDate}\n            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}\n            required\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Meeting format\n          </label>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"text\", label: \"Text chat\" },\n              { value: \"voice\", label: \"Voice calls\" },\n              { value: \"mixed\", label: \"Mixed\" },\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                onClick={() => setMeetingFormat(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Maximum group size\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={maxGroupSize}\n            onChange={(e) => setMaxGroupSize(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            {[2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].map((n) => (\n              <option key={n} value={n}>\n                {n} readers\n              </option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <button\n          type=\"submit\"\n          className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\n          disabled={loading || !bookTitle}\n        >\n          {loading ? \"Creating...\" : \"Create reading group\"}\n        </button>\n      </form>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":18,"oldLines":6,"newStart":18,"newLines":7,"lines":["   const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");","   const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");","   const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");","+  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);"," ","   const handleBookSelect = (book: {","     title: string;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}
