{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PgNFimsbjjBvagEVELCBiy","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/create/page.tsx has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"95312b12-041a-4f29-940a-ff91269d98fd","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:04:35.280Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/create/page.tsx","oldString":"          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n        }),","newString":"          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n          requiresApproval,\n        }),","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport BookSearch from \"@/components/BookSearch\";\n\nexport default function CreateListingPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookOlid, setBookOlid] = useState(\"\");\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n\n  const handleBookSelect = (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => {\n    setBookTitle(book.title);\n    setBookAuthor(book.author);\n    setBookCoverUrl(book.coverUrl);\n    setBookOlid(book.olid);\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setError(\"\");\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/listings/create\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          bookTitle,\n          bookAuthor,\n          bookCoverUrl,\n          bookOlid,\n          language,\n          readingPace,\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const data = await res.json();\n\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to create listing\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      router.push(`/listings/${data.id}`);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-3xl mb-2\">Start a reading group</h1>\n      <p\n        className=\"mb-8\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Choose a book, set your pace, and wait for readers to join.\n      </p>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-5\">\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Book\n          </label>\n          <BookSearch onSelect={handleBookSelect} />\n          {bookTitle && (\n            <div\n              className=\"mt-2 flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg\"\n              style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\" }}\n            >\n              {bookCoverUrl && (\n                <img\n                  src={bookCoverUrl}\n                  alt=\"\"\n                  className=\"w-10 h-14 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              )}\n              <div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {bookTitle}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  by {bookAuthor}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Discussion language\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={language}\n            onChange={(e) => setLanguage(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            <option>English</option>\n            <option>Spanish</option>\n            <option>French</option>\n            <option>German</option>\n            <option>Russian</option>\n            <option>Portuguese</option>\n            <option>Italian</option>\n            <option>Japanese</option>\n            <option>Chinese</option>\n            <option>Korean</option>\n            <option>Other</option>\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Reading pace\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"text\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={readingPace}\n            onChange={(e) => setReadingPace(e.target.value)}\n            required\n            placeholder='e.g. \"1 chapter per week\" or \"50 pages per day\"'\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Start date\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"date\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={startDate}\n            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}\n            required\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Meeting format\n          </label>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"text\", label: \"Text chat\" },\n              { value: \"voice\", label: \"Voice calls\" },\n              { value: \"mixed\", label: \"Mixed\" },\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                onClick={() => setMeetingFormat(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Maximum group size\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={maxGroupSize}\n            onChange={(e) => setMaxGroupSize(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            {[2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].map((n) => (\n              <option key={n} value={n}>\n                {n} readers\n              </option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <button\n          type=\"submit\"\n          className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\n          disabled={loading || !bookTitle}\n        >\n          {loading ? \"Creating...\" : \"Create reading group\"}\n        </button>\n      </form>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":51,"oldLines":6,"newStart":51,"newLines":7,"lines":["           startDate,","           meetingFormat,","           maxGroupSize,","+          requiresApproval,","         }),","       });"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

&& (\n              <svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 12 12\" fill=\"white\">\n                <path d=\"M10 3L4.5 8.5L2 6\" stroke=\"white\" strokeWidth=\"2\" fill=\"none\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\"/>\n              </svg>\n            )}\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              Require approval for new members\n            </div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-xs mt-0.5\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Members must be approved by you before joining the group.\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <button\n          type=\"submit\"\n          className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\n          disabled={loading || !bookTitle}\n        >\n          {loading ? \"Creating...\" : \"Create reading group\"}\n        </button>","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport BookSearch from \"@/components/BookSearch\";\n\nexport default function CreateListingPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookOlid, setBookOlid] = useState(\"\");\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n\n  const handleBookSelect = (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => {\n    setBookTitle(book.title);\n    setBookAuthor(book.author);\n    setBookCoverUrl(book.coverUrl);\n    setBookOlid(book.olid);\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setError(\"\");\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/listings/create\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          bookTitle,\n          bookAuthor,\n          bookCoverUrl,\n          bookOlid,\n          language,\n          readingPace,\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n          requiresApproval,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const data = await res.json();\n\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to create listing\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      router.push(`/listings/${data.id}`);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-3xl mb-2\">Start a reading group</h1>\n      <p\n        className=\"mb-8\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Choose a book, set your pace, and wait for readers to join.\n      </p>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-5\">\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Book\n          </label>\n          <BookSearch onSelect={handleBookSelect} />\n          {bookTitle && (\n            <div\n              className=\"mt-2 flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg\"\n              style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\" }}\n            >\n              {bookCoverUrl && (\n                <img\n                  src={bookCoverUrl}\n                  alt=\"\"\n                  className=\"w-10 h-14 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              )}\n              <div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {bookTitle}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  by {bookAuthor}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Discussion language\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={language}\n            onChange={(e) => setLanguage(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            <option>English</option>\n            <option>Spanish</option>\n            <option>French</option>\n            <option>German</option>\n            <option>Russian</option>\n            <option>Portuguese</option>\n            <option>Italian</option>\n            <option>Japanese</option>\n            <option>Chinese</option>\n            <option>Korean</option>\n            <option>Other</option>\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Reading pace\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"text\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={readingPace}\n            onChange={(e) => setReadingPace(e.target.value)}\n            required\n            placeholder='e.g. \"1 chapter per week\" or \"50 pages per day\"'\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Start date\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"date\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={startDate}\n            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}\n            required\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Meeting format\n          </label>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"text\", label: \"Text chat\" },\n              { value: \"voice\", label: \"Voice calls\" },\n              { value: \"mixed\", label: \"Mixed\" },\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                onClick={() => setMeetingFormat(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Maximum group size\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={maxGroupSize}\n            onChange={(e) => setMaxGroupSize(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            {[2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].map((n) => (\n              <option key={n} value={n}>\n                {n} readers\n              </option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <button\n          type=\"submit\"\n          className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\n          disabled={loading || !bookTitle}\n        >\n          {loading ? \"Creating...\" : \"Create reading group\"}\n        </button>\n      </form>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":262,"oldLines":6,"newStart":262,"newLines":55,"lines":["           </select>","         </div>"," ","+        <div","+          className=\"flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg cursor-pointer\"","+          style={{","+            backgroundColor: requiresApproval","+              ? \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\"","+              : \"transparent\",","+            border: requiresApproval","+              ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"","+              : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",","+          }}","+          onClick={() => setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval)}","+        >","+          <div","+            className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5\"","+            style={{","+              flexShrink: 0,","+              backgroundColor: requiresApproval","+                ? \"var(--color-accent)\"","+                : \"transparent\",","+              border: requiresApproval","+    </svg>","+            )}","+          </div>","+          <div>","+            <div","+              className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"","+              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}","+            >","+              Require approval for new members","+            </div>","+            <div","+              className=\"text-xs mt-0.5\"","+              style={{","+ book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n  hasApplied: boolean;\n  applicationStatus: string;\n  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n}","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (data.listing) {\n      setListing(data.listing);\n      setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    }\n    setLoading(false);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [id]);\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-5\">\n          {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n            <img\n              src={listing.book_cover_url}\n              alt={listing.book_title}\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n              style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n            />\n          ) : (\n            <div\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-4xl\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                flexShrink: 0,\n              }}\n            >\n              📖\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-5 pt-4 flex items-center justify-between\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Telegram link section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Step-by-step instructions */}\n              <div\n                className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}\n              >\n                <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>\n                  How to create a Telegram group:\n                </p>\n                <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                  <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>\n                  <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>\n                  <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>\n                  <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>\n                  <li>\n                    Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}\n                    <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>\n                  </li>\n                  <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>\n                  <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                </ol>\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <input\n                    type=\"url\"\n                    className=\"input-field\"\n                    placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"\n                    value={telegramLink}\n                    onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}\n                    style={{\n                      borderColor: telegramLinkError\n                        ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                        : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError\n                          ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                          : undefined,\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  {telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                      {telegramLinkError}\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                  {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                      Valid Telegram link\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  className=\"btn-primary\"\n                  onClick={handleTelegramSave}\n                  disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}\n                  style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}\n                >\n                  {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once\n                they set up the group. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n          Readers ({listing.memberCount})\n        </h2>\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {listing.members.map((member) => (\n            <div\n              key={member.id}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div\n                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              >\n                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n                  {member.display_name}\n                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Organizer\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                {member.bio && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"text-xs\"\n                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {member.bio}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <p\n        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}\n        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n          month: \"long\",\n          day: \"numeric\",\n          year: \"numeric\",\n        })}\n      </p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":10,"oldLines":6,"newStart":10,"newLines":14,"lines":["   joined_at: string;"," }"," ","+interface Applicant {","+  application_id: number;","+  id: number;","+  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");","newString":"  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n  hasApplied: boolean;\n  applicationStatus: string;\n  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (data.listing) {\n      setListing(data.listing);\n      setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    }\n    setLoading(false);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [id]);\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-5\">\n          {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n            <img\n              src={listing.book_cover_url}\n              alt={listing.book_title}\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n              style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n            />\n          ) : (\n            <div\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-4xl\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                flexShrink: 0,\n              }}\n            >\n              📖\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-5 pt-4 flex items-center justify-between\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Telegram link section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Step-by-step instructions */}\n              <div\n                className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}\n              >\n                <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>\n                  How to create a Telegram group:\n                </p>\n                <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                  <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>\n                  <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>\n                  <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>\n                  <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>\n                  <li>\n                    Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}\n                    <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>\n                  </li>\n                  <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>\n                  <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                </ol>\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <input\n                    type=\"url\"\n                    className=\"input-field\"\n                    placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"\n                    value={telegramLink}\n                    onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}\n                    style={{\n                      borderColor: telegramLinkError\n                        ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                        : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError\n                          ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                          : undefined,\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  {telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                      {telegramLinkError}\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                  {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                      Valid Telegram link\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  className=\"btn-primary\"\n                  onClick={handleTelegramSave}\n                  disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}\n                  style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}\n                >\n                  {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once\n                they set up the group. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n          Readers ({listing.memberCount})\n        </h2>\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {listing.members.map((member) => (\n            <div\n              key={member.id}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div\n                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              >\n                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n                  {member.display_name}\n                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Organizer\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                {member.bio && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"text-xs\"\n                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {member.bio}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <p\n        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}\n        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n          month: \"long\",\n          day: \"numeric\",\n          year: \"numeric\",\n        })}\n      </p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":49,"oldLines":6,"newStart":49,"newLines":8,"lines":["   const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);","   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);","   const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);","+  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);","+  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);","   const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");","   const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);","   const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013AL8XLEhi2GowPqZGCj1Gy","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/page.tsx has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"8833db87-2f13-4a50-a2ac-6aabfbd9da13","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:05:10.196Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/page.tsx","oldString":"  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {","newString":"  const handleApply = async () => {\n    setApplying(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setApplying(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDecidingId(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n  hasApplied: boolean;\n  applicationStatus: string;\n  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (data.listing) {\n      setListing(data.listing);\n      setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    }\n    setLoading(false);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [id]);\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-5\">\n          {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n            <img\n              src={listing.book_cover_url}\n              alt={listing.book_title}\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n              style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n            />\n          ) : (\n            <div\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-4xl\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                flexShrink: 0,\n              }}\n            >\n              📖\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-5 pt-4 flex items-center justify-between\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Telegram link section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Step-by-step instructions */}\n              <div\n                className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}\n              >\n                <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>\n                  How to create a Telegram group:\n                </p>\n                <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                  <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>\n                  <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>\n                  <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>\n                  <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>\n                  <li>\n                    Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}\n                    <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>\n                  </li>\n                  <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>\n                  <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                </ol>\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <input\n                    type=\"url\"\n                    className=\"input-field\"\n                    placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"\n                    value={telegramLink}\n                    onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}\n                    style={{\n                      borderColor: telegramLinkError\n                        ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                        : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError\n                          ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                          : undefined,\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  {telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                      {telegramLinkError}\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                  {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                      Valid Telegram link\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  className=\"btn-primary\"\n                  onClick={handleTelegramSave}\n                  disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}\n                  style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}\n                >\n                  {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once\n                they set up the group. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n          Readers ({listing.memberCount})\n        </h2>\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {listing.members.map((member) => (\n            <div\n              key={member.id}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div\n                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              >\n                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n                  {member.display_name}\n                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Organizer\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                {member.bio && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"text-xs\"\n                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {member.bio}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <p\n        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}\n        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n          month: \"long\",\n          day: \"numeric\",\n          year: \"numeric\",\n        })}\n      </p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":92,"oldLines":6,"newStart":92,"newLines":50,"lines":["     }","   };"," ","+  const handleApply = async () => {","+    setApplying(true);","+    setError(\"\");","+    try {","+      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });","+      const data = await res.json();","+      if (!res.ok) {","+        if (res.status === 401) {","+          router.push(\"/auth/login\");","+          return;","+        }","+        setError(data.error);","+        return;","+      }","+      await fetchListing();","+    } catch {","+      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");","+    } finally {","+      setApplying(false);","+    }","+  };","+","+  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {","+    setDecidingId(applicationId);","+    setError(\"\");","+    try {","+      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {","+        method: \"PATCH\",","+        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },","+        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),","+      });","+      const data = await res.json();","+      if (!res.ok) {","+        setError(data.error);","+        return;","+      }","+      await fetchListing();","+    } catch {","+      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");","+    } finally {","+      setDecidingId(null);","+    }","+  };","+","   const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {","     return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());","   };"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"89e8797a-3381-4f90-b381-bc53b4720a77","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:05:29.986Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/page.tsx","oldString":"          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n
