\"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}","newString":"          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && !listing.requires_approval && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && listing.requires_approval && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleApply}\n              disabled={applying}\n            >\n              {applying ? \"Applying...\" : \"Apply to join\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Application pending\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n  hasApplied: boolean;\n  applicationStatus: string;\n  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (data.listing) {\n      setListing(data.listing);\n      setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    }\n    setLoading(false);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [id]);\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleApply = async () => {\n    setApplying(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setApplying(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDecidingId(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-5\">\n          {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n            <img\n              src={listing.book_cover_url}\n              alt={listing.book_title}\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n              style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n            />\n          ) : (\n            <div\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-4xl\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                flexShrink: 0,\n              }}\n            >\n              📖\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-5 pt-4 flex items-center justify-between\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Telegram link section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Step-by-step instructions */}\n              <div\n                className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}\n              >\n                <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>\n                  How to create a Telegram group:\n                </p>\n                <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                  <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>\n                  <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>\n                  <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>\n                  <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>\n                  <li>\n                    Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}\n                    <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>\n                  </li>\n                  <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>\n                  <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                </ol>\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <input\n                    type=\"url\"\n                    className=\"input-field\"\n                    placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"\n                    value={telegramLink}\n                    onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}\n                    style={{\n                      borderColor: telegramLinkError\n                        ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                        : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError\n                          ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                          : undefined,\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  {telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                      {telegramLinkError}\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                  {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                      Valid Telegram link\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  className=\"btn-primary\"\n                  onClick={handleTelegramSave}\n                  disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}\n                  style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}\n                >\n                  {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once\n                they set up the group. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n          Readers ({listing.memberCount})\n        </h2>\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {listing.members.map((member) => (\n            <div\n              key={member.id}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div\n                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              >\n                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n                  {member.display_name}\n                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Organizer\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                {member.bio && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"text-xs\"\n                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {member.bio}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <p\n        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}\n        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n          month: \"long\",\n          day: \"numeric\",\n          year: \"numeric\",\n        })}\n      </p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":303,"oldLines":7,"newStart":303,"newLines":7,"lines":["             )}","           </div>"," ","-          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && (","+ {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01UpED2Zgreb6epb4WrE6h2F","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01FKLbPhyr4GZ8NXCL1uHSbE","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/page.tsx","old_string":"      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">","new_string":"      {/* Pending Applicants — visible to author on approval-gated listings */}\n      {listing.isAuthor && listing.requires_approval && listing.pendingApplicants.length > 0 && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n            Pending Applicants ({listing.pendingApplicants.length})\n          </h2>\n          <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n            {listing.pendingApplicants.map((applicant) => (\n              <div\n                key={applicant.application_id}\n                className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n              >\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"#6b7280\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n                >\n                  {applicant.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">{applicant.display_name}</div>\n                  {applicant.bio && (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                      style={{ className=\"flex gap-2\" style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>\n                  <button\n                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      color: \"white\",\n                      border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n       </h2>\n          <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n            {listing.pendingApplicants.map((applicant) => (\n              <div\n                key={applicant.application_id}\n                className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n              >\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex             style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      color: \"white\",\n                      border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n           border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"reject\")}\n                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}\n                  >\n                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Reject\"}\n                  </button>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n  hasApplied: boolean;\n  applicationStatus: string;\n  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (data.listing) {\n      setListing(data.listing);\n      setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    }\n    setLoading(false);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [id]);\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleApply = async () => {\n    setApplying(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setApplying(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDecidingId(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-5\">\n          {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n            <img\n              src={listing.book_cover_url}\n              alt={listing.book_title}\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n              style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n            />\n          ) : (\n            <div\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-4xl\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                flexShrink: 0,\n              }}\n            >\n              📖\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-5 pt-4 flex items-center justify-between\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && !listing.requires_approval && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && listing.requires_approval && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleApply}\n              disabled={applying}\n            >\n              {applying ? \"Applying...\" : \"Apply to join\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Application pending\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Telegram link section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Step-by-step instructions */}\n              <div\n                className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}\n              >\n                <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>\n                  How to create a Telegram group:\n                </p>\n                <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                  <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>\n                  <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>\n                  <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>\n                  <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>\n                  <li>\n                    Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}\n                    <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>\n                  </li>\n                  <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>\n                  <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                </ol>\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <input\n                    type=\"url\"\n                    className=\"input-field\"\n                    placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"\n                    value={telegramLink}\n                    onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}\n                    style={{\n                      borderColor: telegramLinkError\n                        ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                        : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError\n                          ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                          : undefined,\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  {telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                      {telegramLinkError}\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                  {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                      Valid Telegram link\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  className=\"btn-primary\"\n                  onClick={handleTelegramSave}\n                  disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}\n                  style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}\n                >\n                  {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once\n                they set up the group. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n          Readers ({listing.memberCount})\n        </h2>\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {listing.members.map((member) => (\n            <div\n              key={member.id}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div\n                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              >\n                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n                  {member.display_name}\n                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Organizer\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                {member.bio && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"text-xs\"\n                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {member.bio}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <p\n        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}\n        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n          month: \"long\",\n          day: \"numeric\",\n          year: \"numeric\",\n        })}\n      </p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":488,"oldLines":6,"newStart":488,"newLines":68,"lines":["         </div>","       )}"," ","+      {/* Pending Applicants — visible to author on approval-gated listings */}","+      {listing.isAuthor && listing.requires_approval && listing.pendingApplicants.length > 0 && (","+        <div className=\"card mb-6\">","+          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">","+            Pending Applicants ({listing.pendingApplicants.length})","+          </h2>","+          <div className=\"space-y-3\">","+            {listing.pendingApplicants.map((applicant) => (","+              <div","+                key={applicant.application_id}","+                className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"","+                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}","+              >","+                <div","+                  className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"","+                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"#6b7280\", flexShrink: 0 }}","+                >","+                  {applicant.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}","+                </div>","+                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">","+                  <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">{applicant.display_name}</div>","+                  {applicant.bio && (","+                    <div","+                      className=\"text-xs truncate\"","+                      style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}","+                    >","+                      {applicant.bio}","+                    </div>","+                  )}","+                </div>","+                <div className=\"flex gap-2\" style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>","+                  <button","+                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"","+                    style={{","+                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",","+                      color: \"white\",","+                      border: \"none\",","+                    }}","+                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"approve\")}","+                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}","+                  >","+                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Approve\"}","+                  </button>","+                  <button","+                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"","+                    style={{","+                      backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",","+                      color: \"var(--color-error)\",","+                      border: \"none\",","+                    }}","+                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"reject\")}","+                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}","+                  >","+                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Reject\"}","+                  </button>","+                </div>","+              </div>","+            ))}","+          </div>","+        </div>","+      )}","+","       {/* Members */}","       <div className=\"card\">","         <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BzH3EVfru4G8r3ipqdjp4v","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/page.tsx has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"2546bfb5-3b92-4f41-97dd-6dbc5a1a5c1f","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:05:49.288Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/page.tsx","oldString":"            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >","newString":"            {listing.requires_approval ? (\n              <span\n                className=\"badge mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                  color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.7rem\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Approval required\n              </span>\n            ) : null}\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n  hasApplied: boolean;\n  applicationStatus: string;\n  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const fetchListing = async () => {\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    const data = await res.json();\n    if (data.listing) {\n      setListing(data.listing);\n      setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    }\n    setLoading(false);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n  }, [id]);\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleApply = async () => {\n    setApplying(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setApplying(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDecidingId(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-5\">\n          {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n            <img\n              src={listing.book_cover_url}\n              alt={listing.book_title}\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n              style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n            />\n          ) : (\n            <div\n              className=\"w-24 h-36 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-4xl\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                flexShrink: 0,\n              }}\n            >\n              📖\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-5 pt-4 flex items-center justify-between\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && !listing.requires_approval && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && listing.requires_approval && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleApply}\n              disabled={applying}\n            >\n              {applying ? \"Applying...\" : \"Apply to join\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Application pending\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Telegram link section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Step-by-step instructions */}\n              <div\n                className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}\n              >\n                <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>\n                  How to create a Telegram group:\n                </p>\n                <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                  <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>\n                  <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>\n                  <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>\n                  <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>\n                  <li>\n                    Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}\n                    <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>\n                  </li>\n                  <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>\n                  <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                </ol>\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                  <input\n                    type=\"url\"\n                    className=\"input-field\"\n                    placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"\n                    value={telegramLink}\n                    onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}\n                    style={{\n                      borderColor: telegramLinkError\n                        ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                        : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError\n                          ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                          : undefined,\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  {telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                      {telegramLinkError}\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                  {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                      Valid Telegram link\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  className=\"btn-primary\"\n                  onClick={handleTelegramSave}\n                  disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}\n                  style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}\n                >\n                  {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once\n                they set up the group. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Pending Applicants — visible to author on approval-gated listings */}\n      {listing.isAuthor && listing.requires_approval && listing.pendingApplicants.length > 0 && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n            Pending Applicants ({listing.pendingApplicants.length})\n          </h2>\n          <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n            {listing.pendingApplicants.map((applicant) => (\n              <div\n                key={applicant.application_id}\n                className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n              >\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"#6b7280\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n                >\n                  {applicant.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">{applicant.display_name}</div>\n                  {applicant.bio && (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                      style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                    >\n                      {applicant.bio}\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2\" style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>\n                  <button\n                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      color: \"white\",\n                      border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"approve\")}\n                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}\n                  >\n                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Approve\"}\n                  </button>\n                  <button\n                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n                      color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                      border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"reject\")}\n                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}\n                  >\n                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Reject\"}\n                  </button>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n          Readers ({listing.memberCount})\n        </h2>\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {listing.members.map((member) => (\n            <div\n              key={member.id}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div\n                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              >\n                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n                  {member.display_name}\n                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Organizer\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                {member.bio && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"text-xs\"\n                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {member.bio}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <p\n        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}\n        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n          month: \"long\",\n          day: \"numeric\",\n          year: \"numeric\",\n        })}\n      </p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":245,"oldLines":6,"newStart":245,"newLines":20,"lines":["               by {listing.book_author}","             </p>"," ","+            {listing.requires_approval ? (","+              <span","+                className=\"badge mb-3\"","+                style={{","+                  backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",","+                  color: \"var(--color-accent)\",","+                  fontSize: \"0.7rem\",","+                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",","+                }}","+              >","+                Approval required","+              </span>","+            ) : null}","+","             <div","               className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-6 text-sm\"","               style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XmdSioxR9RcESdWwCME3RR","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     5→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     6→\n     7→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n     8→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n     9→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    10→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    11→\n    12→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    13→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    14→\n    15→  if (q) {\n    16→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    17→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    21→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    22→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (readingPace) {\n    26→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    27→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    28→  }\n    29→\n    30→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    31→\n    32→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    33→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    34→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    35→\n    36→  const listings = db\n    37→    .prepare(\n    38→      `SELECT\n    39→        l.*,\n    40→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    41→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    42→      FROM listings l\n    43→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    44→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    45→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}`\n    46→    )\n    47→    .all(...params);\n    48→\n    49→  return NextResponse.json({ listings });\n    50→}\n    51→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"79c0b511-5bb8-46ad-a639-2c3bb7f049b5","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:06:49.858Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n\n  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n\n  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n\n  if (q) {\n    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n  }\n\n  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    params.push(meetingFormat);\n  }\n\n  if (readingPace) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n  }\n\n  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n\n  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n\n  const listings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE ${whereClause}\n      ORDER BY ${orderClause}`\n    )\n    .all(...params);\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ listings });\n}\n","numLines":51,"startLine":1,"totalLines":51}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JNwBAxtb2gdSiVPjfgN6M4","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→\n     6→interface Listing {\n     7→  id: number;\n     8→  book_title: string;\n     9→  book_author: string;\n    10→  book_cover_url: string;\n    11→  language: string;\n    12→  reading_pace: string;\n    13→  start_date: string;\n    14→  meeting_format: string;\n    15→  max_group_size: number;\n    16→  member_count: number;\n    17→  author_name: string;\n    18→  created_at: string;\n    19→}\n    20→\n    21→export default function HomePage() {\n    22→  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n    23→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    24→\n    25→  // Search & filter state\n    26→  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    27→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n    28→  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n    29→  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n    30→\n    31→  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    32→\n    33→  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    34→    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string) => {\n    35→      setLoading(true);\n    36→      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n    37→      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n    38→      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n    39→      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n    40→\n    41→      const qs = params.toString();\n    42→      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n    43→        .then((r) => r.json())\n    44→        .then((data) => {\n    45→          setListings(data.listings || []);\n    46→          setLoading(false);\n    47→        })\n    48→        .catch(() => setLoading(false));\n    49→    },\n    50→    []"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"5381e213-2ab1-478d-b507-121047e8ddcf","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:06:54.747Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string) => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n        .then((r) => r.json())\n        .then((data) => {\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch(() => setLoading(false));\n    },\n    []","numLines":50,"startLine":1,"totalLines":434}}}
