{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MvrZ1jMaFeNYJrnSk4zbrA","type":"tool_result","content":"    50→    []\n    51→  );\n    52→\n    53→  // Initial fetch\n    54→  useEffect(() => {\n    55→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\");\n    56→  }, [fetchListings]);\n    57→\n    58→  // Debounced search\n    59→  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    60→    setSearchQuery(value);\n    61→    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    62→    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n    63→      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort);\n    64→    }, 400);\n    65→  };\n    66→\n    67→  // Immediate filter changes\n    68→  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    69→    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    70→    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort);\n    71→  };\n    72→\n    73→  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    74→    setSort(value);\n    75→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value);\n    76→  };\n    77→\n    78→  const clearFilters = () => {\n    79→    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    80→    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    81→    setSort(\"newest\");\n    82→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\");\n    83→  };\n    84→\n    85→  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || sort !== \"newest\";\n    86→\n    87→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    88→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n    89→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n    90→      text: \"Text chat\",\n    91→      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    92→    };\n    93→    return labels[f] || f;\n    94→  };\n    95→\n    96→  return (\n    97→    <div>\n    98→      <div className=\"text-center mb-8 mt-4\">\n    99→        <h1 className=\"text-4xl mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n   100→          Find your reading companion\n   101→        </h1>\n   102→        <p\n   103→          className=\"text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n   104→          style={{\n   105→            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   106→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   107→          }}\n   108→        >\n   109→          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n   110→          connect on Telegram to read together.\n   111→        </p>\n   112→      </div>\n   113→\n   114→      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n   115→      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n   116→        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n   117→          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n   118→            <input\n   119→              type=\"text\"\n   120→              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n   121→              value={searchQuery}\n   122→              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n   123→              className=\"input-field\"\n   124→              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n   125→            />\n   126→            <svg\n   127→              style={{\n   128→                position: \"absolute\",\n   129→                left: \"0.75rem\",\n   130→                top: \"50%\",\n   131→                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n   132→                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   133→                width: \"1.125rem\",\n   134→                height: \"1.125rem\",\n   135→                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n   136→              }}\n   137→              fill=\"none\"\n   138→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   139→              strokeWidth={2}\n   140→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   141→            >\n   142→              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n   143→              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n   144→            </svg>\n   145→          </div>\n   146→          <button\n   147→            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n   148→            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   149→            style={{\n   150→              display: \"flex\",\n   151→              alignItems: \"center\",\n   152→              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n   153→              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n   154→              position: \"relative\",\n   155→            }}\n   156→          >\n   157→            <svg\n   158→              width=\"16\"\n   159→              height=\"16\"\n   160→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   161→              fill=\"none\"\n   162→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   163→              strokeWidth={2}\n   164→            >\n   165→              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n   166→              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n   167→              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n   168→            </svg>\n   169→            Filters\n   170→            {hasActiveFilters && (\n   171→              <span\n   172→                style={{\n   173→                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n   174→                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n   175→                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n   176→                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   177→                  position: \"absolute\",\n   178→                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n   179→                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n   180→                }}\n   181→              />\n   182→            )}\n   183→          </button>\n   184→        </div>\n   185→\n   186→        {/* Filter panel */}\n   187→        {filtersOpen && (\n   188→          <div\n   189→            className=\"card mt-3\"\n   190→            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n   191→          >\n   192→            <div\n   193→              className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-end\"\n   194→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   195→            >\n   196→              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n   197→                <label\n   198→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   199→                  style={{\n   200→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   201→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   202→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   203→                  }}\n   204→                >\n   205→                  Meeting format\n   206→                </label>\n   207→                <select\n   208→                  value={meetingFormat}\n   209→                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n   210→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   211→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   212→                >\n   213→                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n   214→                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n   215→                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n   216→                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n   217→                </select>\n   218→              </div>\n   219→\n   220→              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n   221→                <label\n   222→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   223→                  style={{\n   224→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   225→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   226→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   227→                  }}\n   228→                >\n   229→                  Sort by\n   230→                </label>\n   231→                <select\n   232→                  value={sort}\n   233→                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n   234→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   235→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   236→                >\n   237→                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n   238→                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n   239→                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n   240→                </select>\n   241→              </div>\n   242→\n   243→              {hasActiveFilters && (\n   244→                <button\n   245→                  onClick={clearFilters}\n   246→                  style={{\n   247→                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   248→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   249→                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   250→                    fontWeight: 600,\n   251→                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n   252→                    background: \"none\",\n   253→                    border: \"none\",\n   254→                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n   255→                  }}\n   256→                >\n   257→    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\");\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value);\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\");\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-8 mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-4xl mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div\n          className=\"text-center py-16\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n        >\n          <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            Loading listings...\n          </p>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {listings.length} open group{listings.length !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n              >\n                {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n                  <img\n                    src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                    alt={listing.book_title}\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                    style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                  />\n                ) : (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-2xl\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                      flexShrink: 0,\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    📖\n                  </div>\n                )}\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n                    </span>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              </Link>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","numLines":385,"startLine":50,"totalLines":434}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5yTB5jsx6keKfzZR9UDBa","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"2423856b-2119-4054-99a5-552456e25342","timestamp":"2026-03-19T23:07:05.836Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx","oldString":"  max_group_size: number;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}","newString":"  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string) => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n        .then((r) => r.json())\n        .then((data) => {\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch(() => setLoading(false));\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\");\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value);\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\");\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-8 mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-4xl mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div\n          className=\"text-center py-16\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n        >\n          <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            Loading listings...\n          </p>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {listings.length} open group{listings.length !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n              >\n                {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n                  <img\n                    src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                    alt={listing.book_title}\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                    style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                  />\n                ) : (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-2xl\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                      flexShrink: 0,\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    📖\n                  </div>\n                )}\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n                    </span>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              </Link>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":13,"oldLines":6,"newStart":13,"newLines":7,"lines":["   start_date: string;","   meeting_format: string;","   max_group_size: number;","+  requires_approval: number;","   member_count: number;","   author_name: string;","   created_at: string;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

(\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        Approval required\n                      </span>\n                    ) : null}\n                  </div>","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string) => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n        .then((r) => r.json())\n        .then((data) => {\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch(() => setLoading(false));\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\");\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value);\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\");\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-8 mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-4xl mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div style={{ minWidth: \"160px\" }}>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div\n          className=\"text-center py-16\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n        >\n          <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            Loading listings...\n          </p>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {listings.length} open group{listings.length !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n              >\n                {listing.book_cover_url ? (\n                  <img\n                    src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                    alt={listing.book_title}\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                    style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                  />\n                ) : (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-16 h-24 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-2xl\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n                      flexShrink: 0,\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    📖\n                  </div>\n                )}\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n                    </span>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              </Link>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":422,"oldLines":6,"newStart":422,"newLines":17,"lines":["                     >"," {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01PzMi1FVgMywUzBeHhayaBj","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01RKHE7fRTaqrgbLnsZ6gqpr","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"git commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfeat: add applicant approval system for listing authors\n\nAllow listing authors to optionally require approval for new members.\nWhen enabled, users apply instead of directly joining, and the author\ncan approve or reject each applicant from the listing detail page.\n\n- Add listing_applications table and requires_approval column\n- New API endpoints: POST /apply, PATCH /applications\n- Guard direct join endpoint when approval is required\n- Add approval toggle to listing creation form\n- Show pending applicants panel to authors\n- Display \"Approval required\" badge on listings\n- Auto-reject remaining applicants when group fills\n- Allow re-application after rejection\n- Notifications for applications, approvals, and rejections\n\nCloses #12\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Commit approval system implementation"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":230,"cache_read_input_tokens":73772,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":230},"output_tokens":24,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"7f43fcbf-90e8-4fad-b1ce-0ecfd183b637"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01L6PFCbr78o69qi1cFTMuUR","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01A97CwGQmnHbY7BtkdZDEbQ","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --title \"feat: add applicant approval system\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n- Listing authors can optionally enable approval-gated membership when creating a group\n- Users \"Apply to join\" instead of auto-joining; authors see a pending applicants panel with approve/reject buttons\n- New `listing_applications` table, `requires_approval` column on listings, and two new API endpoints (`/apply`, `/applications`)\n- Notifications sent for application received, approved, and rejected events\n- \"Approval required\" badge shown on listing cards and detail pages\n- When a group fills via approval, remaining pending applicants are auto-rejected\n\n## Changes\n- **DB**: `listing_applications` table + `requires_approval` column migration\n- **API**: `POST /api/listings/[id]/apply`, `PATCH /api/listings/[id]/applications`\n- **Guards**: Direct join blocked when `requires_approval = 1`\n- **UI**: Create page toggle, detail page apply/pending states, applicant management panel, badge on homepage cards\n\n## Test plan\n- [ ] Create a listing with \"Require approval\" enabled\n- [ ] Apply to join as another user — verify \"Application pending\" badge shows\n- [ ] As author, approve an applicant — verify they appear in members list\n- [ ] As author, reject an applicant — verify they get a notification\n- [ ] Verify direct join still works on non-approval listings\n- [ ] Verify group auto-closes and remaining applicants are rejected when full\n- [ ] Build passes: `cd app && npm run build`\n\nCloses #12\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\" --repo TommyBrennan/bookmate 2>&1","description":"Create pull request"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":251,"cache_read_input_tokens":74371,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":251},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"edf36aec-3dc9-4f0f-819e-13191aa0ecca"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01CERJrzf1EfSUWdTN4gD7zc","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01WriPkZg9ERnDWP5msFLBr6","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-20_00-00.md","content":"# Session: 2026-03-20 00:00 UTC\n\n## Triage Summary\n- **Production**: No production environment deployed yet\n- **PRD Sync**: All features have issues (#1-#14) — no gaps\n- **Follow-ups**: PR #18 (Extended Profile) ready to merge — 1+ sessions, no objections\n- **Work selected**: Merge PR #18, then implement P2 #12 (Applicant Approval System)\n\n## Work Done\n\n### 1. Merged PR #18\n- PR #18 (Extended User Profile, closes #10) — merged to main\n- All P1 issues now complete\n\n### 2. Applicant Approval System (#12) — PR #19\n- **DB changes**: New `listing_applications` table, `requires_approval` column on listings\n- **New API endpoints**:\n  - `POST /api/listings/[id]/apply` — submit application to approval-gated listing\n  - `PATCH /api/listings/[id]/applications` — author approve/reject with transaction safety\n- **Guards**: Direct join endpoint blocked when `requires_approval = 1`\n- **Create listing page**: Added \"Require approval for new members\" toggle\n- **Listing detail page**:\n  - \"Apply to join\" button for approval-gated listings\n  - \"Application pending\" badge for users who have applied\n  - Pending applicants management panel for authors (approve/reject buttons)\n  - \"Approval required\" badge in listing header\n- **Homepage**: \"Approval required\" badge on listing cards\n- **Notifications**: Application received, approved, and rejected notification types\n- **Edge cases**: Re-application after rejection, auto-reject remaining applicants when group fills\n- Branch: `feat/approval-system`, PR #19\n\n## Verification\n- Build passes (`npm run build`)\n- All new and existing routes compile successfully\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Merge PR #19 (1 session elapsed, no objections)\n2. Start next P2 issue: #11 (Auto Telegram), #13 (Ratings), or #14 (Discord)\n3. Merged PR #18\n- PR #18 (Extended User Profile, closes #10) — merged to main\n- All P1 issues now complete\n\n### 2. Applicant Approval System (#12) — PR #19\n- **DB changes**: New `listing_applications` table, `requires_approval` column on listings\n- **New API endpoints**:\n  - `POST /api/listings/[id]/apply` — submit application to approval-gated listing\n  - `PATCH /api/listings/[id]/applications` — author approve/reject with transaction safety\n- **Guards**: Direct join endpoint blocked when `requires_approval = 1`\n- **Create listing page**: Added \"Require approval for new members\" toggle\n- **Listing detail page**:\n  - \"Apply to join\" button for approval-gated listings\n  - \"Application pending\" badge for users who have applied\n  - Pending applicants management panel for authors (approve/reject buttons)\n  - \"Approval required\" badge in listing header\n- **Homepage**: \"Approval required\" badge on listing cards\n- **Notifications**: Application received, approved, and rejected notification types\n- **Edge cases**: Re-application after rejection, auto-reject remaining applicants when group fills\n- Branch: `feat/approval-system`, PR #19\n\n## Verification\n- Build passes (`npm run build`)\n- All new and existing routes compile successfully\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Merge PR #19 (1 session elapsed, no objections)\n2. Start next P2 issue: #11 (Auto Telegram), #13 (Ratings), or #14 (Discord)\n3. Consider deployment setup\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01MHvrcmW7BXFccXoyjDeUGx","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QxotDXBT44ehVQtB9zR4Mi","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/MEMORY.md","content":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All 7 P0 issues (#1-#7) completed\n- All 3 P1 issues (#8, #9, #10) completed and merged\n- P2 #12 (Approval System) implemented — PR #19 open\n\n## Open PRs\n- #19: Applicant Approval System (feat/approval-system) — closes #12\n\n## Open Issues\n- P2: #11 (Telegram auto-create), #13 (Ratings), #14 (Discord)\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser consistently crashes in this container (Chromium memory) — verify with curl instead\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- No production environment deployed yet\n- DB has user_genres table and listing_applications table\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Merge PR #19 (1 session elapsed, no objections)\n2. Start next P2 issue (#11, #13, or #14)\n3. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01Ad45jGSnF5kb7SeFMVyk7p","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"## Session Summary\n\n**Completed this session:**\n\n1. **Merged PR #18** (Extended User Profile) — all P1 issues now complete\n2. **Implemented Applicant Approval System** (P2, issue #12) — PR #19:\n   - New `listing_applications` table and `requires_approval` column\n   - Two new API endpoints: `POST /apply` and `PATCH /applications`\n   - Approval toggle on listing creation form\n   - Apply/pending states on listing detail page\n   - Pending applicants management panel for authors (approve/reject)\n   - \"Approval required\" badges on listing cards and detail pages\n   - Notifications for applications, approvals, and rejections\n   - Edge cases: re-application after rejection, auto-reject when group fills\n   - Build passes ✅\n\n**Next session:** Merge PR #19, then pick up another P2 issue (#11, #13, or #14)."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":315,"cache_read_input_tokens":78106,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":315},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","uuid":"55df526d-6abc-47f3-8675-b03f5c4a6e13"}

{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":569666,"duration_api_ms":506605,"num_turns":68,"result":"## Session Summary\n\n**Completed this session:**\n\n1. **Merged PR #18** (Extended User Profile) — all P1 issues now complete\n2. **Implemented Applicant Approval System** (P2, issue #12) — PR #19:\n   - New `listing_applications` table and `requires_approval` column\n   - Two new API endpoints: `POST /apply` and `PATCH /applications`\n   - Approval toggle on listing creation form\n   - Apply/pending states on listing detail page\n   - Pending applicants management panel for authors (approve/reject)\n   - \"Approval required\" badges on listing cards and detail pages\n   - Notifications for applications, approvals, and rejections\n   - Edge cases: re-application after rejection, auto-reject when group fills\n   - Build passes ✅\n\n**Next session:** Merge PR #19, then pick up another P2 issue (#11, #13, or #14).","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"235c9f17-c672-4220-8162-6bda60e23e6c","total_cost_usd":2.4562430000000006,"usage":{"input_tokens":124,"cache_creation_input_tokens":67906,"cache_read_input_tokens":2771310,"output_tokens":18221,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":67906,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-6":{"inputTokens":124,"outputTokens":18221,"cacheReadInputTokens":2771310,"cacheCreationInputTokens":67906,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":2.2662125,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":64000},"claude-sonnet-4-6":{"inputTokens":7,"outputTokens":5196,"cacheReadInputTokens":68615,"cacheCreationInputTokens":24396,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.1900305,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"42d3d1d6-126d-43f0-8dfd-aef99ebe3dde"}
